title: Apathetic Mobs Reborn
body:
A ground-up reimplementation of [Apathetic Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apathetic-mobs) for 1.16+. This version uses Mixins and shares a common codebase for the Fabric version and the Forge version.

A blacklist for difficulties and mobs has been implemented. Revenge is also available as an option.


Things should work largely the same as they did with 1.12 and the other mod installed.

Mod compatibility:

* Vanilla: 100% (if something doesn't work, open an issue)
* Other mods: untested. If they use vanilla AI goals, they will most likely work. If they use custom AI, compatibility will need to be added.
 

**What players are saying about this mod:**

 
> "It's only with Apathetic Mobs that you can finally take a selfie with a creeper."
